## Checklist

- [ ] `Invoke-ScriptAnalyzer -Path .\script.ps1 -Severity Error` returns no errors
- [ ] Version bumped in the `.NOTES` block of `script.ps1` (if behaviour changed)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated with a new entry (if behaviour changed)
- [ ] `README.md` updated if parameters, output, or usage changed
